name: Spicy Chicken Coconut Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Slivered fresh lemon, with peel
1 1/2 tsp Chopped hot chile pepper, or to taste
2 Green onions, thinly sliced (including part of green top)
3 tsp Minced lemon grass or 1 teaspoon grated lemon zest
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts in a pan with just enough cold water to cover. Bring to a boil over medium heat; immediately reduce heat so water barely ripples.
2. Simmer uncovered, until done, about 12 minutes. Meat should be moist and opaque throughout; cook only to just beyond pink stage.
3. Remove breasts and drain well. Cool to room temperature; remove and discard skin and bones. Shred meat into bite-sized pieces. Reserve.
4. Combine slivered lemon, fish sauce, chile pepper, green onion, and sugar in a bowl; set aside.
5. In a saucepan, combine coconut milk, chicken stock, lemon grass, mushrooms, and galangal. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, until lemon grass is tender, about 15 to 20 minutes.
7. Add reserved chicken and lemon mixture and heat through, about 3 minutes.
Serves 6 to 8 as a first course or 4 as a main course.
